title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Ethiopian highland origin
description: Harar Ethiopia — Catha edulis cultivated 1,000+ years. 13th-century Sufi accounts describe evening chewing sessions.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Ethiopian highland origin
description: Addis Ababa — central trade hub. Ethiopia's #2 foreign-exchange earner after coffee.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Yemeni highland cultivation
description: Sana'a Yemen — khat chewing session ('tafrita') is central to social + political life. Estimated 70% of water use in Yemen goes to khat cultivation.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Yemeni highland cultivation
description: Aden — historical British colonial port; khat trade regulated under Empire.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Horn of Africa daily trade
description: Somaliland / Hargeisa — central market, women-dominated trade. Daily freshness requirement = tight supply chain.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Horn of Africa daily trade
description: Djibouti — transit hub + consumption center. Afternoon khat chewing is near-universal among men.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: Horn of Africa daily trade
description: Meru County Kenya — 'miraa' export to Somalia + UK diaspora. Major regional economic driver.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: UK diaspora + 2014 ban
description: London — Somali diaspora market. UK banned khat 2014 (Class C drug) despite Home Office advisory council recommending no ban.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: UK diaspora + 2014 ban
description: Amsterdam — major transit hub to UK + US (pre-bans); still legal in Netherlands for personal use.

title: LAYER 1 — Historical Trade: UK diaspora + 2014 ban
description: NYC — Somali + Yemeni diaspora. Khat is Schedule I in the US; smuggled via frozen shipments.

title: LAYER 2 — Language Diffusion: regional names
description: Swahili / Meru — 'miraa' (grade names muguka, mbaine, alele). Kenyan trade name.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Supply Chain (today)
description: Harar Ethiopia — world's largest khat production. ~#2 export earner.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Supply Chain (today)
description: Meru Kenya — 'miraa' air-freighted daily to Somalia + Yemeni diaspora.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Supply Chain (today)
description: Mogadishu Somalia — arguably world's largest per-capita khat consumer market.

title: LAYER 3 — Modern Supply Chain (today)
description: Sana'a Yemen — domestic cultivation + consumption; civil war disrupts but has not stopped trade.
